---
title: "Viktor Anchutin"
image: photo.jpg
toc: true
format: 
  html: 
    link-external-newwindow: true
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/viktor-anchutin/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ViktorAnchutin
 
listing: 
  type: grid
  contents:
    - "projects.qmd"
    - "blog.qmd"
---

# About

<p>I'm a software engineer trained in Data Science and Robotics.</p>
<p>I started as a robotics software developer, using C and C++, where I worked on a control and navigation system for a UAV. Later I transitioned to backend engineering with Kotlin/Java, where I built various data-intensive systems. In this role I developed appreciation and interest to data management systems and distributed computing.</p> 
<p>In 2022 I decided to pursue my old interest in Machine Learning and went to Malaysia to get a masters Degree in Data Science. For 1.5 years I immersed myself in statistics, deep learing and big data management.</p>
<p>I am a systems thinker, technology agnostic, and I enjoy building challenging systems.</p>
